bg.comment: Default page background — light theme baseline.

fg.comment: Default body text — light theme baseline.

border.comment: Decorative hairline divider — exempt from WCAG 1.4.11 (decorative). Interactive component boundaries land as `border-strong` in Phase 1.

accent.comment: Primary accent (indigo-600) — light theme. Locked palette.

accent-fg.comment: Foreground used on accent backgrounds (buttons, badges).

accent-soft.comment: Translucent accent tint for hover/focus surfaces. Pre-computed fallback emitted alongside live color-mix().
